mapper.select: SELECT A.*, DECODE(MOVE_BGN_YMD, '', '', DECODE(MOVE_BGN_YMD, '-', '-', MOVE_BGN_YMD || ' ~ ' || MOVE_END_YMD)) AS PERIOD FROM EMPLOYEE_SPC A

SELECT Y.* FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY GUBUN DESC, DEPT_NAME, JIKGUB_CD) AS RANK, A.ORG_NM, A.JIKGUN_NM, A.JIKGUB_NM, A.NAME, A.EMPNO, A.GUBUN, B.DEPT_NAME, A.MOVE_BGN_YMD, A.MOVE_END_YMD FROM EMPLOYEE_SEND A, DEPT_BM B WHERE A.GUBUN IN ('20', '30') AND A.DEPTNO = B.DEPTNO ) Y ORDER BY RANK

SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, Y.*, DECODE(SUBSTR(JIKGUB_NM, 1, 3), '시니어', '시' || SUBSTR(JIKGUB_NM, 5, 1), SUBSTR(JIKGUB_NM, 1, 1)) AS JIKGUB FROM ( SELECT A.*, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY A.JIKGUB_CD ASC, A.NAME ASC) AS RANK FROM EMPLOYEE_POOL A WHERE DEPTNO = #{deptno} ) Y ORDER BY RANK

SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, Y.*, DECODE(SUBSTR(JIKGUB_NM, 1, 3), '시니어', '시' || SUBSTR(JIKGUB_NM, 5, 1), SUBSTR(JIKGUB_NM, 1, 1)) AS JIKGUB FROM ( SELECT A.*, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY A.JIKGUB_CD ASC, A.NAME ASC) AS RANK FROM EMPLOYEE_POOL A WHERE DEPTNO = #{deptno} AND GUBUN IN ('20', '30') ) Y ORDER BY RANK

SELECT A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6, A7, (A0 + A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5 + A6 + A7) AS A0_SUM, (A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5 + A6 + A7) AS A1_SUM, B0, B1, B2, B3, (B0 + B1 + B2 + B3) AS B0_SUM, (B1 + B2 + B3) AS B1_SUM, C0, C1, C2, C3, C4, (C0 + C1 + C2 + C3 + C4) AS C0_SUM, (C1 + C2 + C3 + C4) AS C1_SUM, D0, D1, D2, D3, D4, (D0 + D1 + D2 + D3 + D4) AS D0_SUM, (D1 + D2 + D3 + D4) AS D1_SUM FROM ( SELECT SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1000', 1, 0)) AS A0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1010', 1, 0)) AS A1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1020', 1, 0)) AS A2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1030', 1, 0)) AS A3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1040', 1, 0)) AS A4, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1050', 1, 0)) AS A5, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1060', 1, 0)) AS A6, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1070', 1, 0)) AS A7, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2000', 1, 0)) AS B0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2010', 1, 0)) AS B1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2020', 1, 0)) AS B2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2030', 1, 0)) AS B3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3000', 1, 0)) AS C0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3010', 1, 0)) AS C1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3020', 1, 0)) AS C2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3030', 1, 0)) AS C3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3040', 1, 0)) AS C4, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4000', 1, 0)) AS D0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4010', 1, 0)) AS D1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4020', 1, 0)) AS D2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4030', 1, 0)) AS D3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4040', 1, 0)) AS D4 FROM EMPLOYEE_POOL A, DEPT_BM B WHERE A.DEPTNO(+) = B.DEPTNO )

SELECT A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6, A7, (A0 + A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5 + A6 + A7) AS A0_SUM, (A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5 + A6 + A7) AS A1_SUM, B0, B1, B2, B3, (B0 + B1 + B2 + B3) AS B0_SUM, (B1 + B2 + B3) AS B1_SUM, C0, C1, C2, C3, C4, (C0 + C1 + C2 + C3 + C4) AS C0_SUM, (C1 + C2 + C3 + C4) AS C1_SUM, D0, D1, D2, D3, D4, (D0 + D1 + D2 + D3 + D4) AS D0_SUM, (D1 + D2 + D3 + D4) AS D1_SUM FROM ( SELECT SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1000', 1, 0)) AS A0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1010', 1, 0)) AS A1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1020', 1, 0)) AS A2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1030', 1, 0)) AS A3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1040', 1, 0)) AS A4, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1050', 1, 0)) AS A5, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1060', 1, 0)) AS A6, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '1070', 1, 0)) AS A7, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2000', 1, 0)) AS B0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2010', 1, 0)) AS B1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2020', 1, 0)) AS B2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '2030', 1, 0)) AS B3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3000', 1, 0)) AS C0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3010', 1, 0)) AS C1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3020', 1, 0)) AS C2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3030', 1, 0)) AS C3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '3040', 1, 0)) AS C4, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4000', 1, 0)) AS D0, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4010', 1, 0)) AS D1, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4020', 1, 0)) AS D2, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4030', 1, 0)) AS D3, SUM(DECODE(A.DEPTNO, '4040', 1, 0)) AS D4 FROM EMPLOYEE_POOL A, DEPT_BM B WHERE A.DEPTNO(+) = B.DEPTNO AND GUBUN IN ('20', '30') )
SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(A.JIKGUB_NM, 1, 3), '시니어', '시' || SUBSTR(A.JIKGUB_NM, 5, 1), SUBSTR(A.JIKGUB_NM, 1, 1)) AS JIKGUB, A.* FROM EMPLOYEE_POOL A WHERE DEPTNO = #{deptno} AND EMPNO = #{empno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE_POOL ( EMPNO, DEPTNO, GUBUN, NAME, TITLE_CD, TITLE, JIKGUB_CD, JIKGUB_NM, POS_CD, POS_NM, JIKGUN_CD, JIKGUN_NM, TASK_INFO, GRADE, BOJIK_YMD, MOVE_BGN_YMD, MOVE_END_YMD, ORG_CD, ORG_NM, FIRST_ORG, SECOND_ORG, THIRD_ORG, FOURTH_ORG, FIFTH_ORG, FIRST_ORG_NM, SECOND_ORG_NM, THIRD_ORG_NM, FOURTH_ORG_NM, FIFTH_ORG_NM, IPSA_YMD, JIKGUB_YMD, CUR_ORG_CD, CUR_ORG_NM, CUR_FIRST_ORG, CUR_SECOND_ORG, CUR_THIRD_ORG, CUR_FOURTH_ORG, CUR_FIFTH_ORG, CUR_FIRST_ORG_NM, CUR_SECOND_ORG_NM, CUR_THIRD_ORG_NM, CUR_FOURTH_ORG_NM, CUR_FIFTH_ORG_NM, REG_ID, REG_DATE ) SELECT #{empno}, #{deptno}, #{gubun}, #{name}, #{titleCd}, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM COM_CODE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CODE_GROUP = '166' AND CODE_VALUE = #{titleCd}), JIKGUB_CD, JIKGUB_NM, POS_CD, POS_NM, JIKGUN_CD, JIKGUN_NM, #{taskInfo}, #{grade}, BOJIK_YMD, #{moveBgnYmd}, #{moveEndYmd}, ORG_CD, ORG_NM, FIRST_ORG, SECOND_ORG, THIRD_ORG, FOURTH_ORG, FIFTH_ORG, FIRST_ORG_NM, SECOND_ORG_NM, THIRD_ORG_NM, FOURTH_ORG_NM, FIFTH_ORG_NM, IPSA_YMD, JIKGUB_YMD, NEW_ORG_CD, NEW_ORG_NM, NEW_FIRST_ORG, NEW_SECOND_ORG, NEW_THIRD_ORG, NEW_FOURTH_ORG, NEW_FIFTH_ORG, NEW_FIRST_ORG_NM, NEW_SECOND_ORG_NM, NEW_THIRD_ORG_NM, NEW_FOURTH_ORG_NM, NEW_FIFTH_ORG_NM, #{empId}, SYSDATE FROM INSA_EMP_TBL@WEBADM WHERE SABUN = #{empno}
mapper.update: UPDATE EMPLOYEE_POOL SET NAME = #{name}, JIKGUB_NM = #{jikgubNm}, TITLE_CD = #{titleCd}, JIKGUN_NM = #{jikgunNm}, POS_NM = #{posNm}, IPSA_YMD = #{ipsaYmd}, JIKGUB_YMD = #{jikgubYmd}, BOJIK_YMD = #{bojikYmd}, GRADE = #{grade}, TASK_INFO = #{taskInfo}, GUBUN = #{gubun}, CUR_ORG_NM = #{curOrgNm}, MOVE_BGN_YMD = #{moveBgnYmd}, MOVE_END_YMD = #{moveEndYmd}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE, UPD_ID = #{empId} WHERE EMPNO = #{empno}
